title: Less experience
description: Removed experience rewards for these events: mining, fishing, smelting, animal breeding.
body:
Why?

In the early release, only killing Mobs will drop experience.
Nostalgic Tweaks doesn't have this feature, so I made this mod.

I implemented it via Mixin and SubscribeEvent. It should not affect performance.

旨在复现早期游戏的经验掉落。使用了Mixin和订阅事件。感谢可爱群友的技术支援:D
